Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}Well, you're probably pretty tired after your first day, huh? Maybe you should go to bed early.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1022 0 0}The chairman's a nice guy, but his sense of humor can take some getting used to...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1074 0 0}I guess there was a dorm mother here once who cooked and stuff, but it's just us students now.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}Maybe that's why we have such a nice kitchen. It seems like a waste not to use it...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1081 0 0}Yeah... I don't know that I'd really be able to make good use of it, though.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}And Kirijo-senpai doesn't do stuff like cooking. But I would feel kinda bad if no one ever used it...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1107 0 0}Hm. I guess you don't really care about stuff like that, huh? Okay.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1062 0 0}The more I think about it, the more I wanna try using the kitchen sometime... I guess we'll see.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1001 0 0}Kirijo-senpai said she'll be late today. I guess she's processing some paperwork for you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}Hey... Try not to overdo it at school tomorrow, okay?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_695_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1001 0 0}C'mon, they're waiting for you inside.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1062 0 0}Tartarus just drains me for some reason.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}You know how the air is thin at the top of a mountain? It kinda feels like that.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1028 0 0}You too, huh? I guess we'll just have to slowly get used to it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1107 0 0}Oh, is that so? Haha, I guess you're tougher than you look.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1114 0 0}Tartarus seems like it's gonna be pretty tough for a lot of reasons, but let's do our best.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1002 0 0}It's good to use a weapon you're comfortable with. Like for me, I use a bow.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}I'm on the archery team at school, so I'm pretty used to how it feels.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}I'm not an expert or anything, though, so I do miss sometimes...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1025 0 0}But it's not like I miss that often, so I can't sweat the small stuff, right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_1_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1077 0 0}Kirijo-senpai is so stoic, isn't she?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}Well, she has a lot of responsibilities, so maybe it kinda comes with the territory.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1061 0 0}Kirijo-senpai should be in the command room. She said she was gonna do some training.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}Oh, but she also said we can still go to Tartarus tonight, if you want to.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1074 0 0}Hey, {f 4 1}-kun, have you picked up any supplies, like medicine and stuff?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}You probably know this, but I'll tell you just in case: shops aren't open during the Dark Hour.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}So you should get whatever you might need before the Dark Hour.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1066 0 0}We don't want someone to get injured in Tartarus and not be able to do anything about it, y'know?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1062 0 0}I don't think I really have time for student council.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}I'm busy enough with archery, studying, and fighting Shadows. It's already kind of a lot.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}And, I mean, Kirijo-senpai is just...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1093 0 0}Actually, it's nothing. Never mind.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1078 0 0}I'm so glad we can start using the Internet again.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}I've been meaning to check out the new summer clothes that are coming out now.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}I guess I could look at magazines, but it's quicker to just check online. Plus, it's free.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1074 0 0}I can't believe it's already the last day of April.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}It was probably one of the hardest months of my life, honestly...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}I hope I can relax a little next month...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1001 0 0}Who was that guy in Sanada-senpai's hospital room? You think it was a friend of his?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1025 0 0}I guess he did say he was "a friend from school"...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}But I don't think I've seen him at school before, so I don't know.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}Sanada-senpai said that guy goes to our school, but I've never seen him there, so it's kinda weird.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1028 0 0}Yeah, I guess you're right. It's none of my business.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1062 0 0}I can't help but wonder who he is. It's just... Agh, sorry, I shouldn't be so obsessed with this.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1007 0 0}Let's try to have some fun during Golden Week.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}Especially since we'll be busy studying for midterms right after it...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1074 0 0}{f 4 1}-kun, have you been studying for the midterms?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}You might wanna start now, if you haven't, since we'll also be busy with Tartarus.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}I mean, it's not like we can tell people that we were too busy fighting Shadows to study.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1062 0 0}I know Apathy Syndrome isn't exactly natural, but even then, something seems off about it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}Maybe I'm just being pessimistic, but I find I'm usually right about the bad stuff...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_029_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}If you weren't there, I'd definitely be dead...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_030_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}The people on the monorail must've been pretty freaked out...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}It was so far off course after the Dark Hour ended.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1060 0 0}Actually, "freaked out" probably doesn't even begin to describe it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_031_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1001 0 0}Sounds like something in the command room is having issues.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}Kirijo-senpai was asking earlier if anyone could take a look at it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 4 -1 -1 0 0}I can't do it, though! I don't have a clue when it comes to stuff like that.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_031_1_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1060 0 0}I guess it's true that missing one day of studying probably won't change our results that much.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 -1 -1 0 0}Ugh, am I really agreeing with Junpei's logic? Maybe I really do need a break...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_032_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1003 0 0}Junpei's acting stupid again. He doesn't care who joins us, as long as she's a girl. Ugh...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_034_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1116 0 0}Well, yeah. Junpei aside, it would be nice to have another girl with us.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_035_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1029 0 0}Right? I mean, the look on his face when he heard about her...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}Well, I guess I shouldn't be upset with someone for being happy, but... we know his reasons.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_036_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1063 0 0}Our exam results come out tomorrow, huh?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}I don't think I flunked it or anything, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}I couldn't really study like I usually do because of Tartarus and everything.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1110 0 0}Hm... I probably shouldn't make excuses. I'll just have to plan better for the next exams.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_037_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1009 0 0}My results were actually better than I expected![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 0 0 0}It seemed like the exams didn't cover that much this time, so I kinda lucked out.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}I do still wish that I had enough energy to study after going to Tartarus, though.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_038_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1062 0 0}It's too bad about that girl, Fuuka Yamagishi, huh?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}It would've been nice if a girl the same year as me joined...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_038_1_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1028 0 0}Thinking about how many more victims there'd be if we couldn't fight Shadows is pretty depressing...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}I'm glad you moved here, {f 4 1}-kun. It's a lot less overwhelming with you here.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}There's no telling when all this will end, but together, I know we can do it eventually.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_039_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1077 0 0}God, I hate bullying. Even just seeing it happen to someone else, it feels just as bad...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_041_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1028 0 0}Right? I overheard these girls today talking about how they were picking on someone...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}I couldn't tell who they were talking about or anything, though. I wish I could do something...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_042_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1071 0 0}You should be careful about that.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}Sometimes, turning a blind eye to that kind of thing can be just as bad as the bullying itself...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_043_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1091 0 0}Oh my god, Stupei, shut up! Now I'm never gonna get to sleep tonight...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_044_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2117 0 0}Well, guess I should take responsibility and come by your room tonight to check on you and—[cr][n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_045_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 -1 -1 0 0}Do I need to call the police? Or, better yet, Kirijo-senpai?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_046_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2101 0 0}Wait, wait! I was gonna say, "and sing you a lullaby"! It was just a joke![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_047_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1062 0 0}The girl they found was one of those girls I overheard talking about bullying someone...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}It's probably unrelated, though... Right, {f 4 1}-kun?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_049_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1028 0 0}Yeah... I'm sure I'm just thinking about it too much.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_050_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1065 0 0}Maybe... Honestly, something about it is bothering me too...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_051_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1022 0 0}What...? Oh, you're talking about Junpei? *sigh*[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 -1 -1 0 0}Seriously, he's such an idiot.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_052_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1053 0 0}I'm trying to find stuff online about that ghost story. It seems like it could take a while, though...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}So I'm not gonna go to Tartarus today. Sorry.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_053_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 -1 -1 0 0}Actually, I didn't get myself into anything! This is all Junpei's fault![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 -1 -1 0 0}Stupei and his stupid "Believe It, or Don't"... Gah![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_054_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1001 0 0}Hey, did you do any research on that ghost story, {f 4 1}-kun?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_056_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1108 0 0}I knew I could count on you. But, man, there sure are a bunch of different stories floating around.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 -1 -1 0 0}I can't tell which are real and which are fake... Maybe they're all fake...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_057_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1072 0 0}Yeah, I honestly kinda figured you'd be too busy to bother with ghost stories.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_057_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1123 0 0}I'm not totally sure how to figure out which stories are true and which aren't...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}But one thing I am sure of is that ghosts don't exist, and I'm gonna prove it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_058_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 -1 -1 0 0}Tomorrow, I'm going to put an end to Junpei's stupid "Believe It, or Don't."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 -1 -1 0 0}You're not too freaked out about all this, right, {f 4 1}-kun?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_060_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1025 0 0}Good! I knew I could count on you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_061_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1123 0 0}Come on, you know ghosts aren't even real, don't you?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_062_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1022 0 0}Yeah, he's always freaked out. Don't worry about it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_063_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1002 0 0}That guy looked kinda scary, but he was actually really nice, don'tcha think?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_065_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1025 0 0}Well, you can't judge a book by its cover and all that. But what was he doing at that place...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_066_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1037 0 0}I mean, he wouldn't have saved us if he wasn't a nice guy, right?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}At the very least, I don't think he's a bad person... So why's he seem like he's trying to act like he is?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_071_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1077 0 0}I bet Kirijo-senpai and Sanada-senpai are trying to convince Yamagishi-san to join our team.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_073_1_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1077 0 0}I hope Kirijo-senpai and Sanada-senpai aren't pressuring her to join us if she doesn't want to.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}Sometimes, it feels like they'd do anything to achieve our goal, you know?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_074_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1089 0 0}I know she technically made the decision on her own, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}It didn't seem like Yamagishi-san was really given much of a choice to me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_075_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1110 0 0}The room must be covered in dust since no one's used it before.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}Please don't let there be any cockroaches...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_076_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1074 0 0}I guess all that talk about Fuuka being sick wasn't true.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}At first, people were saying that she was absent because she was being bullied...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}But then they started saying she was really sick.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1025 0 0}Strange, huh? She seems pretty healthy to me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_078_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1077 0 0}Kirijo-senpai was doing support, and now she'll be fighting with us.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}Most of us can only do one or the other, but she can do both...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}She really can do anything, huh...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_079_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1004 0 0}I kept thinking about how Kirijo-senpai dragged Fuuka into this...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}But Fuuka really seems determined to do her best, so I guess there's no point dwelling on it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}Instead, I'll just focus on doing my best too![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_080_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1062 0 0}Everything about Tartarus is such a mystery...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}How long has it been there? Why did it appear in the first place?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}Do you think we'll ever know the answers...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_081_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1007 0 0}Koromaru's so cute, and he's such a loyal dog.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_083_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5029 0 0}I wish we could take Koro-chan in and look after him here.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}Sanada-senpai could be in charge of walking him, since he goes jogging quite often anyway.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_084_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1029 0 0}Yeah, I can totally see them running along a river together or something.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}Buuut I kinda doubt that we'd be allowed to keep animals in the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_085_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1001 0 0}Our Personas' abilities are amazing, aren't they?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}Secret powers that only we have... It's actually pretty cool, huh?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}It's kind of a shame we can't tell anyone about them.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_086_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1061 0 0}I can't really blame Ikutsuki-san for trying to brighten up the mood...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 -1 -1 0 0}But his jokes are just so lame...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_087_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1074 0 0}I heard that a lot of the people joining the Lost lately are couples.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}I'll try not to assume what they were doing together just before the Dark Hour...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}But anyway, it seems like the next Shadow is starting to make its move, doesn't it...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_087_1_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1001 0 0}Hey, {f 4 1}-kun, do you usually have plans on your days off?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}There's this interesting kid who hangs out at the shrine, so I've been talking to him there lately.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}I'm planning to go see him again tomorrow. If you're free, you should come meet him![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_087_2_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1001 0 0}I kinda get the feeling that the next Shadow is making its move already.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}I should probably start getting ready...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}Maybe I'll shop for some supplies after the shrine tomorrow.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_088_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1001 0 0}I wonder what's at the top of Tartarus...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_089_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5062 0 0}If this was an adventure novel, there'd probably be some kind of treasure...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_090_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2037 0 0}I got it! There's a giant piñata! And when you break it...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}Candy pours out, and a huge banner that says, "Congratulations! You've beaten Tartarus!"[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_091_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}Maybe there's, like, some sort of device, and once we destroy it, Tartarus will disappear...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_092_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1098 0 0}O-Oh, hey. Um, we're just talking about girl stuff, so...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}Hm? What's with that look?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_094_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1060 0 0}What's so suspicious? Seriously, it's just girl talk.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_095_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1025 0 0}You better, haha! But seriously, though, we're just talking.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_096_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 -1 -1 0 0}So... no boys allowed. Maybe later, okay? Just not right now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_097_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1061 0 0}There's still so much we don't know about Tartarus and Shadows...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}But at least we know when the next operation day will be, so we can prepare for it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}So how well do you usually prepare anyway, {f 4 1}-kun?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_099_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1109 0 0}Really? I'm impressed! No wonder you're our leader.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_100_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1117 0 0}Oh, good. I'm glad to hear that. Well, let's keep at it then, okay?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_101_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1071 0 0}Seriously? Is that really a good idea? I feel like the leader should be at least a little prepared...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_101_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1067 0 0}I guess I should start getting ready myself too. We've got less than a week to go, don't we?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_102_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1077 0 0}Kirijo-senpai never tells us more than what she thinks we need to know...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_104_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1028 0 0}Yeah... It's hard for us to know what's going on when she makes all the decisions herself.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}And that kind of behavior can lead to misunderstandings...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_105_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1027 0 0}Yeah, I guess telling everyone everything isn't really her style, but...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_105_2_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1062 0 0}Sorry. I didn't mean to complain.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 0 0 0}Maybe I'll go chat with Amada-kun tomorrow. That usually brightens up my day a little.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_105_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1062 0 0}Only a few more days until the next operation. I'm starting to get a little nervous...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 0 0 0}Maybe I'll feel a little better if I go visit the shrine tomorrow. Oh, did I tell you?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}I met this kid there and we've been chatting once in a while. He says I'm "very helpful." Haha![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}If you're free, you should come join us too, {f 4 1}-kun.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_106_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1062 0 0}I wonder what the next Shadow will be like. I bet it'll be stronger than the other ones so far...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_108_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1067 0 0}Oh, I almost forgot! I wanted to apologize for hitting you yesterday.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}I kept meaning to say something earlier, but I didn't want everyone else to hear...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_109_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1062 0 0}Kirijo-senpai takes her "mission" really seriously.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}She would probably do just about anything to annihilate the Shadows.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}I can respect feeling like there's something you have to do, but... isn't it a bit much sometimes?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_110_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}There are a lot of old sayings about maintaining balance in your life...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}I understand not wanting to be too laid-back, but you shouldn't become obsessive either.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_111_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1001 0 0}Amada-kun is so mature. I can't believe he's only in elementary school.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}There's a certain someone who I wish would learn from Amada-kun's example.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}Why do you think he's so childish all the time? Even an actual child acts more grown-up...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_112_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}It's not like I don't like Yakushima or anything.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}I usually love the ocean and getting some sun. And I don't get seasick, so the trip's not an issue.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1110 0 0}I just... I guess I'm just not really in the mood for it right now...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_113_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1107 0 0}She looks like a normal girl as long as she doesn't do anything too weird. But if she does...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}Do you think anyone will figure out that she's actually a robot?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}Well, maybe not. Most people probably aren't on the lookout for undercover robots.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_114_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1067 0 0}Hey, you saw that the exam results were posted today, right?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}It's great if you did well, but even if you didn't, try not to worry too much.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}With everything that's been going on, I'm sure you did the best you could.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_115_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1006 0 0}Hey, you don't think Amada-kun is gonna end up getting involved in all this, do you?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_117_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1042 0 0}Okay... I feel a little better about it now. Thanks.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_118_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1028 0 0}Yeah... To be honest, I'm a little worried about it...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_119_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}Ikutsuki-san did say that he has the potential...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_119_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1022 0 0}I still can't believe Amada-kun moved into this dorm...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}I really hope he doesn't get dragged into our mess...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_125_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1028 0 0}A country is made up of its people...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}So, if the number of the Lost keeps growing, then the whole country will eventually collapse...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}*sigh* There's so much riding on our shoulders...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_126_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}But have you noticed that Sanada-senpai acts a little different around Amada-kun?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_128_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1062 0 0}I wonder why... Maybe he doesn't get along with kids?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}He does seem a bit socially awkward.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_129_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1022 0 0}Do you just not notice that kind of stuff?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}Anyway, I wonder what it is... I've never seen him like that before.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_130_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1002 0 0}Koro-chan is so awesome! He was so brave that day![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}I don't know how he was trained, but he's amazing![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_130_1_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1077 0 0}At our archery tournament, a bunch of students didn't show up because of Apathy Syndrome.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}I guess we have to work even harder...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_131_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1074 0 0}Do you remember that Shadow from the other day?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}Oh, I'm talking about the one Koro-chan defeated.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}Anyway, for some reason, it reminded me of something Kirijo-senpai said...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1119 0 0}About how normal Shadows don't usually appear outside Tartarus, but some irregular ones do.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}I guess they appeared sometimes back when it was just our senpais who were fighting them.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_131_1_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1123 0 0}Junpei should really join a school club or something. He looks so bored every day.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}He would probably have fun on some sports team. He always has so much energy, after all.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_132_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1119 0 0}Whew, it's so hot... It's really starting to feel like summer...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 -1 -1 0 0}I don't want to get heat exhaustion before the next operation, so I'm gonna stay inside today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_133_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1099 0 0}Wait, we're gonna have to fight the Shadow in this heat, aren't we?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 -1 -1 0 0}Ugh... This mission's gonna be tough...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_133_1_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1006 0 0}I'm starting to get nervous about tomorrow...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}I think I'm gonna check one more time to make sure I'm fully prepared.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_134_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1077 0 0}So if the Dark Hour disappears, then our Personas will disappear too.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}That's basically what those Strega guys were saying, right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_135_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1122 0 0}Summer school, huh...? Well, it's not that I hate studying that much, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}I just don't think we should have to go to school during summer vacation, ya know?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_136_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1110 0 0}Summer school starts tomorrow... Honestly, the more I think about it, the more I'm dreading it...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_137_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}Hey, Koromaru, wanna switch places with me?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_138_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1098 0 0}It looks like Kirijo-senpai and Sanada-senpai went out again.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}How do they still have energy after summer school?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}I'm so tired... I think I'm gonna go to bed early tonight...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_139_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1072 0 0}Oh, today's the summer festival, huh?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}Well, I already made other plans with some friends, so I won't be going this year.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_140_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1061 0 0}I was trying to cook something and kinda messed it up, and Koro-chan happened to be nearby...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 -1 -1 0 0}So I asked him if he wanted a bite. I was just joking, but he ran away so fast...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 -1 -1 0 0}I mean, I know it didn't come out right, but I didn't think it was that bad...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_141_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}What do you think will happen to us if the Dark Hour disappears?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_143_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1062 0 0}Yeah, that's what I think too. Those Strega guys said our Persona abilities will disappear, so...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}We'll probably just go back to being ordinary high school students.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_144_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1095 0 0}Haha, I guess you're kinda right.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}We still have to keep fighting anyway, don't we?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}You've probably thought about this more than I have, huh?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_144_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1095 0 0}I guess there isn't much point thinking about stuff like this. I should be focusing on fighting, right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_145_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1074 0 0}Summer vacation is almost over, but I still have some homework left to do...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}*sigh* I'll get back to it after a short break.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_146_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1123 0 0}Junpei hasn't even touched his homework.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 -1 -1 0 0}He keeps saying that he wants to go to Tartarus instead. Talk about escapism...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_147_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1074 0 0}Amada-kun's only supposed to stay at the dorm for the summer, right?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}I guess that means he'll be heading home soon...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}Even though he wasn't here for very long, it's still gonna be sad to see him go...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_148_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1123 0 0}Geez, why is Junpei trying so hard to act like a senpai?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}Well, since he's not in any clubs, I guess this is his first chance to actually be a senpai.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_149_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}He's just going on about something he's "super into"...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}Well, maybe, just for a day, he should be "super into" getting his homework done.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_150_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1068 0 0}Did Junpei finally give up on finishing his homework?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}He looks kinda out of it. I wonder if he's all right...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_151_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1075 0 0}If she wears a summer uniform, everyone will be able to see her mechanical arms.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}So we decided she should wear a winter uniform.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}Wearing this in the summer's a little weird, but I don't think it's "she must be a robot" weird, right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_152_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1001 0 0}Aragaki-senpai's the guy who helped us out at that place, isn't he?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}And he used to be with SEES, huh? So we'll be fighting with him from now on...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}Oh, I didn't mean to sound like I have a problem with that. I know he's a good guy deep down.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_153_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1123 0 0}He's already so dumb all the time, I forget that, sometimes, he can go even dumber.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}You know, Aragaki-senpai just joined us, so...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}We really don't need Junpei anymore, do we?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_155_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1102 0 0}Calm down, I was just kidding! I don't really want to get rid of him completely...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 -1 -1 0 0}I just wish he wasn't so annoying.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_156_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1131 0 0}Haha! Yeah, I'm just kidding. I just wish he wasn't so annoying.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_157_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1077 0 0}Junpei seems to be really serious about that girl.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}Um... As his teammates, I feel like maybe we should do something... But what?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_159_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1028 0 0}"Encourage him," huh? Honestly, I don't even know how I'd do that...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_160_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1062 0 0}Hmm... Yeah, I guess you're right. It's not like we know the full story anyways.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}But I wonder if that's really all we can do...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_165_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}Um... I'm not gonna mess with him today...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_166_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}When you go near Junpei, it's like... How do I put it? Like he's... radiating happiness, maybe?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 -1 -1 0 0}Did something happen to him...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_167_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1001 0 0}I'm so glad that Aragaki-senpai decided to return to the team.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}I mean, he's strong in battle, but also just knowing that he's on our side kinda puts me at ease.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_168_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}He looks kind of scary, but in reality, he's such a strong and kind senpai.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_169_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}When you go near Junpei, it's like... How do I put it? Like he's... radiating happiness, maybe?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 -1 -1 0 0}Did something happen to him...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_170_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1091 0 0}Guess what! I have to wear a maid outfit![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 -1 -1 0 0}Ugh, this is so messed up![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_172_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1121 0 0}*sigh* Yeah, thanks... God, this is so embarrassing! Maybe I'll just run away...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_173_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1090 0 0}Whaddaya mean, "who cares"!? I care! This is gonna be the most embarrassing thing ever![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_174_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1122 0 0}What...? You like that kind of stuff?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}Um... I didn't think you were like that.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_174_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1089 0 0}Ugh, I hate this... Why don't they consider the feelings of the one who has to wear it?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_175_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1131 0 0}I hate to say it, but... I'm so relieved the festival got canceled.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}I mean, come on, a maid outfit!?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}I'd rather stand outside in the middle of the typhoon than have to wear a maid outfit.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_176_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1067 0 0}Oh, you seem to be feeling better.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}Why don't you go get some fresh air? It's really nice out.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_177_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}I should've made you some rice porridge when you were sick.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1053 0 0}Sorry I didn't think of that sooner...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}Next time you get sick, I'll be sure to make it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_178_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1061 0 0}Only three Shadows left... I bet they're gonna be tough.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_179_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6024 0 0}Yes, that is the most likely scenario.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}It will be difficult to win without thorough training in Tartarus.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_180_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1074 0 0}The other day, I saw Koro-chan eating something other than his usual dog food.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}Do you know who got it for him? Or maybe someone made it?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}He looked so happy eating it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_181_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1077 0 0}I can kinda understand why Amada-kun tends to keep to himself.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}I can't explain it well, but... things that happen when you're little affect how you turn out, so...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_183_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}You'd think I'd be used to it by now, but as the day gets closer, I still get nervous...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_184_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1022 0 0}So we have midterms this month...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}There should be a rule against exams being too soon after an operation.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_184_1_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1006 0 0}It's almost that time again... Are you ready?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}I hope things go as smoothly as always... But, for some reason, I have a bad feeling this time...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_185_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}Fuuka's right. I should've considered his feelings...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}I wonder what he's doing now...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_187_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}He really was prepared to get revenge and leave this world. It's tragic for a kid to think that way...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_186_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}Honestly, I was so worried... What if something terrible happened and he never came back...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_188_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1004 0 0}There's no way I can study right now...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}Not when a close friend just died...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}I can't just forget about it and move on...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_189_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}I'll probably spend more time with the archery team.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}Between studying and fighting Shadows, I haven't been as involved as I'd like to be.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_190_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1074 0 0}I don't feel relieved like I usually do after exams. Do you?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_192_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}Our final operation's coming up. I'm not really sure how to feel...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_193_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}I'm too worried about the last operation coming up to be relieved about anything.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}I guess you're just calmer about these things than me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_193_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1022 0 0}And the final operation is so soon after exams... *sigh* What a way to finish things up...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_198_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1116 0 0}Well, the exam results have been posted...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}Now that we don't have that hanging over our heads anymore, let's focus on Tartarus.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}The next operation will be our last one, so let's put our all into preparing for it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_199_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1001 0 0}Fuuka's really changed, don't you think?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}She used to be so reserved, but now...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}I guess she's still kinda quiet, but she's a lot more open, y'know?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_199_1_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1006 0 0}The city will return to normal once we defeat the next Shadow, right?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}All right, then let's show 'em who's boss, {f 4 1}-kun![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_200_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1074 0 0}I know it's a little strange to ask this now, but... do you have a reason you're fighting?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_202_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}Anyway, the next battle will be our last. I guess I don't need to tell you, but let's do our best![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_203_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1132 0 0}Haha! You sound so casual about it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}Well, reason or not, we've gotten this far, so let's see it through to the end.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_204_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}Either way, the next battle will be our last, so let's do our best.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_204_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1116 0 0}The next battle will settle everything... Let's make extra sure we win, {f 4 1}-kun.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_205_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1123 0 0}Ugh, Junpei keeps going on and on about how we're heroes or something...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_206_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2029 0 0}Of course! We're savin' the whole city, aren't we?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}Plus, if we beat the next mission, we'll be undefeated![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}We'll be real heroes![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_207_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}I never really thought about it that way, but I see your point...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}I guess we better make sure we win the next battle, then.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_208_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1074 0 0}Do you think Koro-chan knows that this next operation will be our last?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_210_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1029 0 0}So do I. Koro-chan is really smart. And they say animals have good instincts.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_211_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1062 0 0}Maybe we should figure out a way to tell him, then.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}I think he'd like to know that he's finally about to avenge his owner.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_212_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1061 0 0}Only three more days till the full moon...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}It's finally starting to hit me... I'm kinda nervous...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}I gotta keep it together. I should try to relax a little...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_214_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1006 0 0}This will make all the Shadows disappear, right?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}Along with the Dark Hour, Tartarus, and everything else?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}Well, no... It won't make my dad's sins disappear...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_215_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1128 0 0}I really thought it was all gonna be over...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}What're we supposed to do now...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_216_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1004 0 0}It's hard to believe in something. Just because you believe doesn't make it true, after all.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}Personally, I almost stopped believing so many times...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}But, ultimately, I'm glad that I kept holding on to that belief.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1095 0 0}Because it turns out that my dad has always been the dad that I believed he was.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_217_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}The Shadows, Tartarus, and the Dark Hour are all still here...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}The whole reason we were fighting was for nothing, and now we're just stuck here...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1091 0 0}Argh! This is pissing me off! Damn you, Ikutsuki![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_218_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5103 0 0}Um, please calm down, Yukari-chan. Getting angry won't help...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_219_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6026 0 0}That is correct. It would be more productive to refrain from thinking about him at all.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_220_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1063 0 0}I don't like how Ryoji-kun hits on all the girls.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}Well, he's pretty good-looking, so a lot of them probably don't mind.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}Unlike Junpei, who couldn't get a girl if he was the last guy on the planet. I almost feel bad for him.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_221_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2102 0 0}I heard that! How dare you say something like that about this hunk of burning love![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_222_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1101 0 0}"Hunk of burning love"? What's that? It sounds kinda dangerous. We better avoid it...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_223_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1061 0 0}Ryoji-kun transferred here at such a weird time of year.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}Maybe it was because of his parents...? What do they do, anyway?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}It seems like no one really knows anything about him.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_224_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1074 0 0}Hey, I heard we're going to Kyoto for the school trip.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_225_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1062 0 0}Everyone's so overly excited about Kyoto.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 -1 -1 0 0}I mean, there's a bunch of historic landmarks, but other than that, it's not much different from here.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_226_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1034 0 0}I wasn't born in Kyoto or anything, I just lived there for a bit.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 -1 -1 0 0}But our classmates keep asking if I'll show them around. It's getting annoying...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 -1 -1 0 0}I know they're just excited for the trip, but I'm not really in the mood to be everyone's tour guide...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_227_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1022 0 0}Well, it's not like it'll help fix our current situation...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}But maybe a trip will give us a chance to clear our heads or something...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_228_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6032 0 0}Yes. Besides, partaking of a school trip is a rare occurrence.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}It would be suboptimal to waste such an opportunity.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_230_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1004 0 0}I told you I used to live in Kyoto, right?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}So I've already seen most of the famous sights.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 1 0}But I never realized the sunset at Kamogawa River was that beautiful.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_231_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1123 0 0}I hope you've thought about what you did.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}Honestly, I'd rather just forget the whole thing...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 -1 -1 0 0}But you better not forget your punishment. Maybe you'll think twice before trying that again.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_232_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}My dad did his very best when he was working...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}He was a hard worker, and he never complained...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1095 0 0}Then again, he didn't do the kind of work we're gonna be doing.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_233_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1074 0 0}Oh, I almost forgot, we have tomorrow off. Labor Day, right?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}But then career experience starts right after that...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_234_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1093 0 0}She was the first girl Junpei's ever been serious about...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}Do you think he'll be okay...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_236_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}Thanks for saying that, though. It makes me feel a little better.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_237_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}Hearing you say it out loud makes me worry even more...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_238_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1006 0 0}Career experience was such a drag...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}I wasn't looking forward to it to begin with, but... then with what happened to Junpei...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}I can't stop thinking about it. I really hope he'll be okay...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_239_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1002 0 0}That drawing of Junpei actually made him look good![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_241_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1062 0 0}Aigis didn't like Ryoji-kun from the moment she met him.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}Do you think they just have clashing personalities or something?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_243_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1061 0 0}It's probably because he's always flirting. To be honest, I don't really like him that much either.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_244_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1131 0 0}Haha, yeah, you're right. It's none of my business.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_244_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1062 0 0}I've never seen Aigis hate someone before, but I guess everyone has their own pet peeves.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_245_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1128 0 0}Everyone is going to die? What the hell![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 -1 -1 0 0}We're all just trying to live our lives the best we can![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 -1 -1 0 0}And now, what, it's all just gonna end? You gotta be kidding me![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_246_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1077 0 0}I think everyone is going to need some time to process everything...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}But we should still go through everything we know. Do you wanna go over it together?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_246_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1056 0 0}Sorry, I'm still trying to wrap my mind around everything. Can you help me go over it all?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_248_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}Nyx is death itself, so we can't avoid it...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_249_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1110 0 0}If we let Ryoji-kun live, we'll have to face Nyx.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}And, apparently, Nyx is undefeatable.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_250_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1093 0 0}The coming of the Fall may be delayed by a little...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}But our memories related to the Dark Hour will disappear.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}It may be the easiest way, but I don't think that I want that...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_251_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1028 0 0}Well, we'll have to make a decision...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}But I don't want to run away...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_252_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1006 0 0}Ryoji-kun said, "the unification was interrupted"...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}That was probably from what my dad did, huh...?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}My dad stood up to the Fall back then, so now it's my turn...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_253_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1077 0 0}I wonder what Ryoji-kun is doing right now...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}He actually seemed the most upset about the world coming to an end.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}I can't help worrying about him too...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_255_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4027 0 0}That's right. He doesn't wish for the Fall to happen, either.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}I'm sure he wants the same thing we do...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_256_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1061 0 0}Everyone's been thinking about the decision we have to make. Have you given it any thought?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_258_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1025 0 0}Yeah, me too. It's not an easy decision to make...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_259_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1095 0 0}Haha, really? I guess I'm not surprised, though.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}Sometimes, I want to stop thinking about it too... The more I think about it, the more unsure I am...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_259_1_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1028 0 0}When you saved us on that monorail, I thought I understood the weight of life...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}But it turns out it's actually way heavier than I thought...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_260_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1077 0 0}Don't worry about what Junpei said earlier, okay?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}You know, all that stuff about how Ryoji-kun was inside you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}No one thinks it's your fault.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1001 0 0}You're still you. The same person now as you've always been.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_261_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1006 0 0}It sucks that we have exams at a time like this... Are you studying for them?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_263_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 4 -1 -1 0 0}I'm impressed that you're able to concentrate with all that's going on.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_264_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}I guess it's a little late to start studying now, but let's try to do our best.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_264_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1022 0 0}I know I should be studying, but my mind keeps wandering...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_265_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1068 0 0}You're not gonna say, "Why aren't you studying?" or something like that?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 -1 -1 0 0}Just so you know, it would be pretty rude to interrupt a conversation like that.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}Besides, it's important to take breaks, too.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_266_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}And last minute studying won't make much of a difference, anyway.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_267_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1071 0 0}Wait, is that your way of saying we're hopeless?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}That's not very nice, Senpai.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_268_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1074 0 0}The exams are finally over, but I don't feel relieved at all... I'm just even more tired.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}This is the same way I felt after the last midterms...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}We thought it was going to be the last battle, but it wasn't...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1022 0 0}*sigh* The more I think about it, the more miserable I feel...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_269_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1025 0 0}It's not like me to just give up.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}No matter what the outcome is, I want to know that I fought for my future.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}That's what I've decided.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_271_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1074 0 0}The other day, I was flipping through a magazine when I saw this poll...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}It was about how much money people want their partners to spend on their Christmas presents.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}I'm usually interested in that kind of thing, but not right now.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1116 0 0}I guess stuff like money and presents doesn't feel like it matters a whole lot anymore, huh?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_273_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}Um... I was just wondering who you were spending Christmas with...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1056 0 0}Uh, never mind. Sorry. I don't mean to be so gloomy...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}It's not like we promised to spend the day together or anything, so...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_274_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}All that's left is New Year's Eve...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}Have you made your decision?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_277_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1060 0 0}Well, we still have a few days left to think about it, so don't rush.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}Take your time and make sure it's a decision you can live with.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_277_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1131 0 0}I think that whatever decision you make will be the right one, so don't worry about it too much.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_282_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1002 0 0}Doesn't everyone seem a little different lately?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}It's like they've all come to a realization or something.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_284_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1068 0 0}I wonder if that means everyone's made up their minds about Ryoji-kun...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_285_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1123 0 0}You can't tell? I feel like it's pretty obvious.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}Then again, I can't tell what you're thinking, or if you've made your decision or not.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_286_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1007 0 0}It finally feels like the team is complete with Aigis back.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}But she's changed so much, don't you think? She seems so... "human" now.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}We probably shouldn't treat her like a robot anymore, huh?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_287_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1001 0 0}I already know my decision. And I have for some time now, actually.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_288_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1117 0 0}There's no way we're just gonna sit back and let the Fall happen.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_289_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1091 0 0}Junpei's such an idiot... A new year just started and he's already being a pervert.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}And right after making such a serious decision, too![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 -1 -1 0 0}And I can't believe the stuff he was saying to Amada-kun either...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_290_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}The ones like, "New Cult Gaining Popularity," and, "Apocalyptic Ideology Spreading"?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}Something tells me it all has to do with Nyx...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_291_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1077 0 0}Things are getting out of hand in the city...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}Before, you could see the Lost here and there, but now they're everywhere...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_292_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6026 0 0}Many people have been affected by Nyx.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}I fear it may get even worse as we get closer to the day of Nyx's arrival.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_293_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4061 0 0}It's astonishing that Nyx can affect an entire city like this. It just goes to show how strong it is...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}But we're the only ones who can do something about it, so we have to fight no matter what.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_294_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1062 0 0}Everyone's so interested in the cult. There are news reports on it every single day.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}It makes me sick... I hope our school won't be obsessed with it too.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_296_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1122 0 0}Ugh, that would suck... I don't even want to think about it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_297_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1060 0 0}I really hope so... It'd be seriously depressing if it wasn't...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_298_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1004 0 0}I thought at least our school would be safe from that cult crap...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}But I guess I was wrong...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}All our classmates are talking about the end of the world and salvation and stuff.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1022 0 0}Why do we have to go through this at school too...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_300_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1062 0 0}That cult is everywhere. All over the city, even in our school...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}Everyone is talking about how the world is going to end as if it's fact.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_301_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2123 0 0}Yeah... How can they give up so easily?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_302_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5027 0 0}Then again, we can't really expect everyone to think like us...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_303_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6026 0 0}Yes. Every human is different and will come to their own conclusions.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}But that's why I believe there are more people out there who won't give up either.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_304_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1061 0 0}I think Strega is controlling people by taking advantage of their insecurities.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}So if people have enough confidence, Strega probably can't influence them.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}I mean, for one, none of us have been swayed by their preaching, right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_306_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1025 0 0}Yeah. So, no matter what, just don't forget who you are and what you really believe in.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_307_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1095 0 0}Haha, that's actually probably a good attitude to take towards that cult.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_308_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1099 0 0}Wow, you must be pretty confident, cracking a joke like that at a time like this.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_308_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1025 0 0}No matter what, we have to hold strong to our beliefs. Let's never forget that.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_308_1_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1002 0 0}I don't really know how they do it... But, however they do it, I think they're right to.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}I'm actually feeling kind of inspired, so maybe I'll do some studying on my own, too.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}Oh, but I'll also definitely go to Tartarus if you want.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_309_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1074 0 0}It's getting pretty obvious who believes in the cult and who doesn't.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}Do you have any friends besides us who don't believe in the cult?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_311_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1109 0 0}That's reassuring. I think this kind of thing really reflects a person's virtue.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_312_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1060 0 0}Oh... That's a little discouraging.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}But I'm sure there are more people out there who have strong values and won't be influenced.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_317_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1078 0 0}We gave Koro-chan a special dinner today![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}He needs to keep up his strength for the final battle, after all. Aww, look how happy he is![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_318_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5131 0 0}Heheh, what a lucky boy you are, right, Koro-chan?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}Eat a lot and get strong, okay?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_319_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1114 0 0}I was so sad seeing Junpei like that back then...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_320_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1122 0 0}The timing for this couldn't be worse.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}We have to figure out what we want in the future now of all times? Seriously?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}Well, what about you, {f 4 1}-kun? Do you know what you want to do?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_322_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1107 0 0}Wow, you really have it together! Then your consultation will be a breeze, huh?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_323_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1067 0 0}Well, we are only second-years, so we still have time to think about it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}Just make sure you're not thinking about it in the middle of a battle.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_324_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1028 0 0}To be honest, I think it's still kinda early to decide what we want to do for the rest of our lives.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}I wonder if Fuuka and Junpei already know what they want to do...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_324_1_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1004 0 0}The "Promised Day"... Honestly, I'm still pretty freaked out by the whole thing.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}But... I feel all right, because we're all gonna take it on together.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_324_2_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1001 0 0}Don't you get nervous when it's the Dark Hour and you're all alone in your room?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}Well, I do... I feel better if I'm in the lounge until it's over.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_330_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1123 0 0}Geez, how does Junpei's mind work?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}How is he so engrossed in instant ramen at a time like this?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}I mean, I'd understand if it were a fruit parfait or something.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_331_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1089 0 0}My father couldn't stop the experiment from happening...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}When I close my eyes, I see his sad face, just like in that video...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}I'm gonna get rid of the Dark Hour so he can smile again.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_0131_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1104 0 0}Oh, hey! I didn't expect to run into you here. Are you shopping too?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_0131_2_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1072 0 0}Getting some supplies for tonight? Thanks for always being on top of everything.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}I should make sure my weapons are ready when I get back later. Well, let's do our best tonight![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_0131_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1025 0 0}Yeah, I guess it's a nice time to take a walk and look around, too.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_0131_4_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1063 0 0}I'm here to check out the new spring collection clothes with Mitsuru-senpai.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}We've never really gone shopping together before, so we thought, "Why not now?"[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}Plus, if we start prepping for the battle this early, I'll be worn out before it even begins.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_0131_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4131 0 0}I joined Yukari to go shopping, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}There are so many fashion trends and designers I don't know of.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}Heh, I certainly can't let myself forget all this, now can I?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_332_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1001 0 0}My dad delayed the Fall until now...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 52 -1 0 0}So he could pass the baton to me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 52 -1 0 0}I'm going to run with it until the very end.[n]{f 1 1}
